title: USGS Landslide Hazards
description: A USGS source card about landslides, triggers, maps, rainfall, slopes, and hazard mitigation.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS landslide resources explain how gravity, slope, water, earthquakes, wildfire, and human activity can contribute to landslide hazards.
Use this source for local hazard research, map reading, and explanation writing about risk and prevention.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
